title: Navigation · Add Activity Menu ("Select activity")
note: Full-screen 'Select activity' overlay. Both sides hardcode the 5 activity types exactly like their sources (AddActivityMenu.swift / add-activity-menu.vue) — the shared block below is documentation, not bound data. iPhone side captures via the pages.add-activity-menu ViewRegistry case (the old component.* sizeThatFits capture was skipped: the view fades in from opacity 0 and fills the screen); the case disables animations so the entrance fade resolves instantly.
